title: ecclinusa cochlearia
intro: Ecclinusa cochlearia is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ecclinusa cochlearia include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused into oil for topical applications, and in some cases, it is used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and wounds.
